title: İK Demografik Yapı
description: APQC standardında tüm demografik, organizasyonel, maaş ve çeşitlilik metrikleri — Workcube canlı veri

aggregate.select: COUNT(DISTINCT EMPLOYEE_ID)
aggregate.where: FINISH_DATE IS NULL AND START_DATE IS NOT NULL

aggregate.select: CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN ed.SEX = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].EMPLOYEE_ID), 0)
aggregate.where: [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].FINISH_DATE IS NULL AND [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].START_DATE IS NOT NULL

aggregate.select: AVG(DATEDIFF(DAY, ei.BIRTH_DATE, GETDATE()) / 365.25)
aggregate.where: [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].FINISH_DATE IS NULL AND [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].START_DATE IS NOT NULL AND ei.BIRTH_DATE IS NOT NULL

aggregate.select: AVG(DATEDIFF(DAY, START_DATE, GETDATE()) / 365.25)
aggregate.where: FINISH_DATE IS NULL AND START_DATE IS NOT NULL

aggregate.select: CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN FINISH_DATE IS NOT NULL AND FINISH_DATE >= :_periodStart AND FINISH_DATE <= :_periodEnd AND ISNULL(EXPLANATION_ID,0) NOT IN (18,26,28) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT EMPLOYEE_ID), 0)
aggregate.where: VALID = 1

aggregate.select: CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN ei.MARRIED = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].EMPLOYEE_ID), 0)
aggregate.where: [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].FINISH_DATE IS NULL AND [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].START_DATE IS NOT NULL

aggregate.select: CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN ed.DEFECTED = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].EMPLOYEE_ID), 0)
aggregate.where: [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].FINISH_DATE IS NULL AND [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].START_DATE IS NOT NULL

aggregate.select: CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEE_POSITIONS].COLLAR_TYPE = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEE_POSITIONS].EMPLOYEE_ID), 0)
aggregate.where: [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEE_POSITIONS].POSITION_STATUS = 1 AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT] eio WHERE eio.EMPLOYEE_ID = [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEE_POSITIONS].EMPLOYEE_ID AND eio.FINISH_DATE IS NULL)

aggregate.select: CASE WHEN ed.SEX = 1 THEN 'Erkek' WHEN ed.SEX = 0 THEN 'Kadın' ELSE 'Belirtilmemiş' END AS label, COUNT(DISTINCT [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].EMPLOYEE_ID) AS value
aggregate.where: [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].FINISH_DATE IS NULL AND [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].START_DATE IS NOT NULL
aggregate.groupBy: CASE WHEN ed.SEX = 1 THEN 'Erkek' WHEN ed.SEX = 0 THEN 'Kadın' ELSE 'Belirtilmemiş' END

aggregate.select: CASE WHEN ei.BIRTH_DATE IS NULL THEN 'Belirtilmemiş' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, ei.BIRTH_DATE, GETDATE()) < 25 THEN '18-24' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, ei.BIRTH_DATE, GETDATE()) < 30 THEN '25-29' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, ei.BIRTH_DATE, GETDATE()) < 35 THEN '30-34' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, ei.BIRTH_DATE, GETDATE()) < 40 THEN '35-39' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, ei.BIRTH_DATE, GETDATE()) < 45 THEN '40-44' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, ei.BIRTH_DATE, GETDATE()) < 50 THEN '45-49' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, ei.BIRTH_DATE, GETDATE()) < 55 THEN '50-54' ELSE '55+' END AS label, COUNT(DISTINCT [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].EMPLOYEE_ID) AS value
aggregate.where: [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].FINISH_DATE IS NULL AND [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].START_DATE IS NOT NULL
aggregate.groupBy: CASE WHEN ei.BIRTH_DATE IS NULL THEN 'Belirtilmemiş' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, ei.BIRTH_DATE, GETDATE()) < 25 THEN '18-24' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, ei.BIRTH_DATE, GETDATE()) < 30 THEN '25-29' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, ei.BIRTH_DATE, GETDATE()) < 35 THEN '30-34' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, ei.BIRTH_DATE, GETDATE()) < 40 THEN '35-39' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, ei.BIRTH_DATE, GETDATE()) < 45 THEN '40-44' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, ei.BIRTH_DATE, GETDATE()) < 50 THEN '45-49' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, ei.BIRTH_DATE, GETDATE()) < 55 THEN '50-54' ELSE '55+' END

aggregate.select: CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, ei.BIRTH_DATE, GETDATE()) < 25 THEN '20-24' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, ei.BIRTH_DATE, GETDATE()) < 30 THEN '25-29' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, ei.BIRTH_DATE, GETDATE()) < 35 THEN '30-34' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, ei.BIRTH_DATE, GETDATE()) < 40 THEN '35-39' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, ei.BIRTH_DATE, GETDATE()) < 45 THEN '40-44' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, ei.BIRTH_DATE, GETDATE()) < 50 THEN '45-49' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, ei.BIRTH_DATE, GETDATE()) < 55 THEN '50-54' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, ei.BIRTH_DATE, GETDATE()) < 60 THEN '55-59' ELSE '60+' END AS label, COUNT(DISTINCT [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].EMPLOYEE_ID) AS value
aggregate.where: [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].FINISH_DATE IS NULL AND [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].START_DATE IS NOT NULL AND ei.BIRTH_DATE IS NOT NULL AND ed.SEX = 1
aggregate.join: LEFT JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IDENTY] ei ON ei.EMPLOYEE_ID = [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].EMPLOYEE_ID LEFT JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_DETAIL] ed ON ed.EMPLOYEE_ID = [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].EMPLOYEE_ID
aggregate.groupBy: CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, ei.BIRTH_DATE, GETDATE()) < 25 THEN '20-24' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, ei.BIRTH_DATE, GETDATE()) < 30 THEN '25-29' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, ei.BIRTH_DATE, GETDATE()) < 35 THEN '30-34' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, ei.BIRTH_DATE, GETDATE()) < 40 THEN '35-39' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, ei.BIRTH_DATE, GETDATE()) < 45 THEN '40-44' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, ei.BIRTH_DATE, GETDATE()) < 50 THEN '45-49' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, ei.BIRTH_DATE, GETDATE()) < 55 THEN '50-54' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, ei.BIRTH_DATE, GETDATE()) < 60 THEN '55-59' ELSE '60+' END

aggregate.select: CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, ei.BIRTH_DATE, GETDATE()) < 25 THEN '20-24' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, ei.BIRTH_DATE, GETDATE()) < 30 THEN '25-29' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, ei.BIRTH_DATE, GETDATE()) < 35 THEN '30-34' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, ei.BIRTH_DATE, GETDATE()) < 40 THEN '35-39' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, ei.BIRTH_DATE, GETDATE()) < 45 THEN '40-44' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, ei.BIRTH_DATE, GETDATE()) < 50 THEN '45-49' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, ei.BIRTH_DATE, GETDATE()) < 55 THEN '50-54' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, ei.BIRTH_DATE, GETDATE()) < 60 THEN '55-59' ELSE '60+' END AS label, COUNT(DISTINCT [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].EMPLOYEE_ID) AS value
aggregate.where: [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].FINISH_DATE IS NULL AND [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].START_DATE IS NOT NULL AND ei.BIRTH_DATE IS NOT NULL AND ed.SEX = 0
aggregate.join: LEFT JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IDENTY] ei ON ei.EMPLOYEE_ID = [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].EMPLOYEE_ID LEFT JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_DETAIL] ed ON ed.EMPLOYEE_ID = [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].EMPLOYEE_ID
aggregate.groupBy: CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, ei.BIRTH_DATE, GETDATE()) < 25 THEN '20-24' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, ei.BIRTH_DATE, GETDATE()) < 30 THEN '25-29' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, ei.BIRTH_DATE, GETDATE()) < 35 THEN '30-34' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, ei.BIRTH_DATE, GETDATE()) < 40 THEN '35-39' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, ei.BIRTH_DATE, GETDATE()) < 45 THEN '40-44' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, ei.BIRTH_DATE, GETDATE()) < 50 THEN '45-49' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, ei.BIRTH_DATE, GETDATE()) < 55 THEN '50-54' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, ei.BIRTH_DATE, GETDATE()) < 60 THEN '55-59' ELSE '60+' END

aggregate.select: CASE ed.LAST_SCHOOL WHEN 1 THEN 'İlköğretim' WHEN 2 THEN 'Lise' WHEN 3 THEN 'Önlisans' WHEN 4 THEN 'Lisans' WHEN 5 THEN 'Yüksek Lisans' WHEN 6 THEN 'Doktora' WHEN 8 THEN 'Ortaokul' WHEN 9 THEN 'Meslek Lisesi' WHEN 10 THEN 'Mühendislik' WHEN 11 THEN 'Fakülte' ELSE 'Belirtilmemiş' END AS label, COUNT(DISTINCT [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].EMPLOYEE_ID) AS value
aggregate.where: [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].FINISH_DATE IS NULL AND [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].START_DATE IS NOT NULL
aggregate.groupBy: CASE ed.LAST_SCHOOL WHEN 1 THEN 'İlköğretim' WHEN 2 THEN 'Lise' WHEN 3 THEN 'Önlisans' WHEN 4 THEN 'Lisans' WHEN 5 THEN 'Yüksek Lisans' WHEN 6 THEN 'Doktora' WHEN 8 THEN 'Ortaokul' WHEN 9 THEN 'Meslek Lisesi' WHEN 10 THEN 'Mühendislik' WHEN 11 THEN 'Fakülte' ELSE 'Belirtilmemiş' END

aggregate.select: ISNULL(NULLIF(RTRIM(d.DEPARTMENT_HEAD),''), 'Belirtilmemiş') AS label, COUNT(DISTINCT [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].EMPLOYEE_ID) AS value
aggregate.where: [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].FINISH_DATE IS NULL AND [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].START_DATE IS NOT NULL
aggregate.groupBy: ISNULL(NULLIF(RTRIM(d.DEPARTMENT_HEAD),''), 'Belirtilmemiş')

aggregate.select: ISNULL(oc.NICK_NAME, 'Belirtilmemiş') AS label, COUNT(DISTINCT [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].EMPLOYEE_ID) AS value
aggregate.where: [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].FINISH_DATE IS NULL AND [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].START_DATE IS NOT NULL
aggregate.join: LEFT JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[BRANCH] b ON b.BRANCH_ID = [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].BRANCH_ID LEFT JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[OUR_COMPANY] oc ON oc.COMP_ID = b.COMPANY_ID
aggregate.groupBy: ISNULL(oc.NICK_NAME, 'Belirtilmemiş')

aggregate.select: ISNULL(b.BRANCH_NAME, 'Belirtilmemiş') AS label, COUNT(DISTINCT [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].EMPLOYEE_ID) AS value
aggregate.where: [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].FINISH_DATE IS NULL AND [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].START_DATE IS NOT NULL
aggregate.groupBy: ISNULL(b.BRANCH_NAME, 'Belirtilmemiş')

aggregate.select: CASE [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEE_POSITIONS].COLLAR_TYPE WHEN 1 THEN 'Mavi Yaka' WHEN 2 THEN 'Beyaz Yaka' ELSE 'Diğer' END AS label, COUNT(DISTINCT [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEE_POSITIONS].EMPLOYEE_ID) AS value
aggregate.where: [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEE_POSITIONS].POSITION_STATUS = 1 AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT] eio WHERE eio.EMPLOYEE_ID = [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEE_POSITIONS].EMPLOYEE_ID AND eio.FINISH_DATE IS NULL)
aggregate.groupBy: CASE [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEE_POSITIONS].COLLAR_TYPE WHEN 1 THEN 'Mavi Yaka' WHEN 2 THEN 'Beyaz Yaka' ELSE 'Diğer' END

aggregate.select: ISNULL(NULLIF(RTRIM([workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEE_POSITIONS].TITLE_NAME),''), 'Belirtilmemiş') AS label, COUNT(DISTINCT [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEE_POSITIONS].EMPLOYEE_ID) AS value
aggregate.where: [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEE_POSITIONS].POSITION_STATUS = 1 AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT] eio WHERE eio.EMPLOYEE_ID = [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEE_POSITIONS].EMPLOYEE_ID AND eio.FINISH_DATE IS NULL)
aggregate.groupBy: ISNULL(NULLIF(RTRIM([workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEE_POSITIONS].TITLE_NAME),''), 'Belirtilmemiş')

aggregate.select: CASE WHEN ei.MARRIED = 1 THEN 'Evli' WHEN ei.MARRIED = 0 THEN 'Bekar' ELSE 'Belirtilmemiş' END AS label, COUNT(DISTINCT [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].EMPLOYEE_ID) AS value
aggregate.where: [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].FINISH_DATE IS NULL AND [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].START_DATE IS NOT NULL
aggregate.groupBy: CASE WHEN ei.MARRIED = 1 THEN 'Evli' WHEN ei.MARRIED = 0 THEN 'Bekar' ELSE 'Belirtilmemiş' END

aggregate.select: CASE ed.MILITARY_STATUS WHEN 1 THEN 'Yapıldı' WHEN 2 THEN 'Tecilli' WHEN 3 THEN 'Muaf' WHEN 4 THEN 'Bedelli' ELSE 'Belirtilmemiş' END AS label, COUNT(DISTINCT [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].EMPLOYEE_ID) AS value
aggregate.where: [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].FINISH_DATE IS NULL AND [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].START_DATE IS NOT NULL AND ed.SEX = 1
aggregate.groupBy: CASE ed.MILITARY_STATUS WHEN 1 THEN 'Yapıldı' WHEN 2 THEN 'Tecilli' WHEN 3 THEN 'Muaf' WHEN 4 THEN 'Bedelli' ELSE 'Belirtilmemiş' END

aggregate.select: CASE WHEN ed.DEFECTED = 1 THEN 'Engelli' ELSE 'Engelsiz' END AS label, COUNT(DISTINCT [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].EMPLOYEE_ID) AS value
aggregate.where: [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].FINISH_DATE IS NULL AND [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].START_DATE IS NOT NULL
aggregate.groupBy: CASE WHEN ed.DEFECTED = 1 THEN 'Engelli' ELSE 'Engelsiz' END

aggregate.select: CASE ei.BLOOD_TYPE WHEN 1 THEN 'A Rh+' WHEN 2 THEN 'A Rh-' WHEN 3 THEN 'B Rh+' WHEN 4 THEN 'B Rh-' WHEN 5 THEN 'AB Rh+' WHEN 6 THEN 'AB Rh-' WHEN 7 THEN '0 Rh+' WHEN 8 THEN '0 Rh-' ELSE 'Belirtilmemiş' END AS label, COUNT(DISTINCT [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].EMPLOYEE_ID) AS value
aggregate.where: [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].FINISH_DATE IS NULL AND [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].START_DATE IS NOT NULL
aggregate.groupBy: CASE ei.BLOOD_TYPE WHEN 1 THEN 'A Rh+' WHEN 2 THEN 'A Rh-' WHEN 3 THEN 'B Rh+' WHEN 4 THEN 'B Rh-' WHEN 5 THEN 'AB Rh+' WHEN 6 THEN 'AB Rh-' WHEN 7 THEN '0 Rh+' WHEN 8 THEN '0 Rh-' ELSE 'Belirtilmemiş' END

aggregate.select: CASE WHEN ei.NATIONALITY IS NULL OR ei.NATIONALITY = 0 THEN 'Belirtilmemiş' WHEN ei.NATIONALITY = 1 THEN 'T.C.' ELSE 'Yabancı Uyruk' END AS label, COUNT(DISTINCT [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].EMPLOYEE_ID) AS value
aggregate.where: [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].FINISH_DATE IS NULL AND [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].START_DATE IS NOT NULL
aggregate.groupBy: CASE WHEN ei.NATIONALITY IS NULL OR ei.NATIONALITY = 0 THEN 'Belirtilmemiş' WHEN ei.NATIONALITY = 1 THEN 'T.C.' ELSE 'Yabancı Uyruk' END

aggregate.select: ISNULL(NULLIF(RTRIM(ei.BIRTH_PLACE),''), 'Belirtilmemiş') AS label, COUNT(DISTINCT [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].EMPLOYEE_ID) AS value
aggregate.where: [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].FINISH_DATE IS NULL AND [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].START_DATE IS NOT NULL
aggregate.groupBy: ISNULL(NULLIF(RTRIM(ei.BIRTH_PLACE),''), 'Belirtilmemiş')

aggregate.select: CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, START_DATE, GETDATE())/365.25 < 1 THEN '0-1 Yıl' WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, START_DATE, GETDATE())/365.25 < 3 THEN '1-3 Yıl' WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, START_DATE, GETDATE())/365.25 < 5 THEN '3-5 Yıl' WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, START_DATE, GETDATE())/365.25 < 10 THEN '5-10 Yıl' ELSE '10+ Yıl' END AS label, COUNT(DISTINCT EMPLOYEE_ID) AS value
aggregate.where: FINISH_DATE IS NULL AND START_DATE IS NOT NULL
aggregate.groupBy: CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, START_DATE, GETDATE())/365.25 < 1 THEN '0-1 Yıl' WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, START_DATE, GETDATE())/365.25 < 3 THEN '1-3 Yıl' WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, START_DATE, GETDATE())/365.25 < 5 THEN '3-5 Yıl' WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, START_DATE, GETDATE())/365.25 < 10 THEN '5-10 Yıl' ELSE '10+ Yıl' END

aggregate.select: CASE DUTY_TYPE WHEN 0 THEN 'Normal' WHEN 1 THEN 'Stajyer' WHEN 2 THEN 'Sözleşmeli' WHEN 3 THEN 'Taşeron' WHEN 4 THEN 'Mevsimlik' WHEN 5 THEN 'Yarı Zamanlı' WHEN 6 THEN 'Geçici' WHEN 7 THEN 'Uzaktan' WHEN 8 THEN 'Danışman' ELSE 'Belirtilmemiş' END AS label, COUNT(DISTINCT EMPLOYEE_ID) AS value
aggregate.where: FINISH_DATE IS NULL AND START_DATE IS NOT NULL
aggregate.groupBy: CASE DUTY_TYPE WHEN 0 THEN 'Normal' WHEN 1 THEN 'Stajyer' WHEN 2 THEN 'Sözleşmeli' WHEN 3 THEN 'Taşeron' WHEN 4 THEN 'Mevsimlik' WHEN 5 THEN 'Yarı Zamanlı' WHEN 6 THEN 'Geçici' WHEN 7 THEN 'Uzaktan' WHEN 8 THEN 'Danışman' ELSE 'Belirtilmemiş' END

aggregate.select: CASE WHEN ISNULL(es.latest_salary, 0) = 0 THEN 'Belirtilmemiş' WHEN es.latest_salary < 20000 THEN '0-20K' WHEN es.latest_salary < 30000 THEN '20-30K' WHEN es.latest_salary < 40000 THEN '30-40K' WHEN es.latest_salary < 50000 THEN '40-50K' WHEN es.latest_salary < 75000 THEN '50-75K' WHEN es.latest_salary < 100000 THEN '75-100K' ELSE '100K+' END AS label, COUNT(DISTINCT [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].EMPLOYEE_ID) AS value
aggregate.where: [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].FINISH_DATE IS NULL AND [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].START_DATE IS NOT NULL
aggregate.join: LEFT JOIN (SELECT EMPLOYEE_ID, MAX(CASE WHEN M3 > 0 THEN M3 WHEN M2 > 0 THEN M2 WHEN M1 > 0 THEN M1 ELSE 0 END) AS latest_salary FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_SALARY] WHERE PERIOD_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND SALARY_CODE = 'BRUT' GROUP BY EMPLOYEE_ID) es ON es.EMPLOYEE_ID = [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].EMPLOYEE_ID
aggregate.groupBy: CASE WHEN ISNULL(es.latest_salary, 0) = 0 THEN 'Belirtilmemiş' WHEN es.latest_salary < 20000 THEN '0-20K' WHEN es.latest_salary < 30000 THEN '20-30K' WHEN es.latest_salary < 40000 THEN '30-40K' WHEN es.latest_salary < 50000 THEN '40-50K' WHEN es.latest_salary < 75000 THEN '50-75K' WHEN es.latest_salary < 100000 THEN '75-100K' ELSE '100K+' END

aggregate.select: CASE WHEN ed.SEX = 1 THEN 'Erkek' WHEN ed.SEX = 0 THEN 'Kadın' ELSE 'Belirtilmemiş' END AS label, CAST(AVG(ISNULL(es.latest_salary, 0)) AS INT) AS value
aggregate.where: [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].FINISH_DATE IS NULL AND [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].START_DATE IS NOT NULL AND ISNULL(es.latest_salary, 0) > 0
aggregate.join: LEFT JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_DETAIL] ed ON ed.EMPLOYEE_ID = [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].EMPLOYEE_ID LEFT JOIN (SELECT EMPLOYEE_ID, MAX(CASE WHEN M3 > 0 THEN M3 WHEN M2 > 0 THEN M2 WHEN M1 > 0 THEN M1 ELSE 0 END) AS latest_salary FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_SALARY] WHERE PERIOD_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND SALARY_CODE = 'BRUT' GROUP BY EMPLOYEE_ID) es ON es.EMPLOYEE_ID = [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].EMPLOYEE_ID
aggregate.groupBy: CASE WHEN ed.SEX = 1 THEN 'Erkek' WHEN ed.SEX = 0 THEN 'Kadın' ELSE 'Belirtilmemiş' END

aggregate.select: CASE WHEN ISNULL(el.cnt, 0) = 0 THEN 'Dil Yok' WHEN el.cnt = 1 THEN '1 Dil' WHEN el.cnt = 2 THEN '2 Dil' ELSE '3+ Dil' END AS label, COUNT(DISTINCT [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].EMPLOYEE_ID) AS value
aggregate.where: [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].FINISH_DATE IS NULL AND [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].START_DATE IS NOT NULL
aggregate.join: LEFT JOIN (SELECT EMPLOYEE_ID, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_APP_LANGUAGE] GROUP BY EMPLOYEE_ID) el ON el.EMPLOYEE_ID = [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].EMPLOYEE_ID
aggregate.groupBy: CASE WHEN ISNULL(el.cnt, 0) = 0 THEN 'Dil Yok' WHEN el.cnt = 1 THEN '1 Dil' WHEN el.cnt = 2 THEN '2 Dil' ELSE '3+ Dil' END

aggregate.select: CASE WHEN ISNULL(eei.cnt, 0) = 0 THEN 'Kayıt Yok' WHEN eei.cnt = 1 THEN '1 Kayıt' WHEN eei.cnt BETWEEN 2 AND 3 THEN '2-3 Kayıt' ELSE '4+ Kayıt' END AS label, COUNT(DISTINCT [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].EMPLOYEE_ID) AS value
aggregate.where: [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].FINISH_DATE IS NULL AND [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].START_DATE IS NOT NULL
aggregate.join: LEFT JOIN (SELECT EMPLOYEE_ID, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_APP_EDU_INFO] GROUP BY EMPLOYEE_ID) eei ON eei.EMPLOYEE_ID = [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].EMPLOYEE_ID
aggregate.groupBy: CASE WHEN ISNULL(eei.cnt, 0) = 0 THEN 'Kayıt Yok' WHEN eei.cnt = 1 THEN '1 Kayıt' WHEN eei.cnt BETWEEN 2 AND 3 THEN '2-3 Kayıt' ELSE '4+ Kayıt' END

aggregate.select: CASE WHEN ed.USE_CIGARETTE = 1 THEN 'Kullanıyor' WHEN ed.USE_CIGARETTE = 0 THEN 'Kullanmıyor' ELSE 'Belirtilmemiş' END AS label, COUNT(DISTINCT [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].EMPLOYEE_ID) AS value
aggregate.where: [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].FINISH_DATE IS NULL AND [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].START_DATE IS NOT NULL
aggregate.groupBy: CASE WHEN ed.USE_CIGARETTE = 1 THEN 'Kullanıyor' WHEN ed.USE_CIGARETTE = 0 THEN 'Kullanmıyor' ELSE 'Belirtilmemiş' END

aggregate.select: ISNULL(sc.CITY_NAME, 'Belirtilmemiş') AS label, COUNT(DISTINCT [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].EMPLOYEE_ID) AS value
aggregate.where: [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].FINISH_DATE IS NULL AND [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].START_DATE IS NOT NULL
aggregate.join: LEFT JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_DETAIL] ed ON ed.EMPLOYEE_ID = [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].EMPLOYEE_ID LEFT JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[SETUP_CITY] sc ON sc.CITY_ID = ed.HOMECITY
aggregate.groupBy: ISNULL(sc.CITY_NAME, 'Belirtilmemiş')

aggregate.select: CASE WHEN ISNULL(ec.cnt, 0) = 0 THEN 'Kurs Yok' WHEN ec.cnt = 1 THEN '1 Kurs' WHEN ec.cnt BETWEEN 2 AND 3 THEN '2-3 Kurs' ELSE '4+ Kurs' END AS label, COUNT(DISTINCT [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].EMPLOYEE_ID) AS value
aggregate.where: [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].FINISH_DATE IS NULL AND [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].START_DATE IS NOT NULL
aggregate.join: LEFT JOIN (SELECT EMPLOYEE_ID, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_COURSE] GROUP BY EMPLOYEE_ID) ec ON ec.EMPLOYEE_ID = [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].EMPLOYEE_ID
aggregate.groupBy: CASE WHEN ISNULL(ec.cnt, 0) = 0 THEN 'Kurs Yok' WHEN ec.cnt = 1 THEN '1 Kurs' WHEN ec.cnt BETWEEN 2 AND 3 THEN '2-3 Kurs' ELSE '4+ Kurs' END

aggregate.select: CASE WHEN ISNULL(er.cnt, 0) = 0 THEN 'Kayıt Yok' WHEN er.cnt = 1 THEN '1 Kişi' WHEN er.cnt BETWEEN 2 AND 3 THEN '2-3 Kişi' WHEN er.cnt BETWEEN 4 AND 5 THEN '4-5 Kişi' ELSE '6+ Kişi' END AS label, COUNT(DISTINCT [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].EMPLOYEE_ID) AS value
aggregate.where: [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].FINISH_DATE IS NULL AND [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].START_DATE IS NOT NULL
aggregate.join: LEFT JOIN (SELECT EMPLOYEE_ID, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_RELATIVES] GROUP BY EMPLOYEE_ID) er ON er.EMPLOYEE_ID = [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].EMPLOYEE_ID
aggregate.groupBy: CASE WHEN ISNULL(er.cnt, 0) = 0 THEN 'Kayıt Yok' WHEN er.cnt = 1 THEN '1 Kişi' WHEN er.cnt BETWEEN 2 AND 3 THEN '2-3 Kişi' WHEN er.cnt BETWEEN 4 AND 5 THEN '4-5 Kişi' ELSE '6+ Kişi' END

aggregate.select: FORMAT(START_DATE, 'yyyy-MM') AS label, COUNT(*) AS value
aggregate.where: VALID = 1 AND START_DATE IS NOT NULL AND START_DATE >= :_periodStart AND ISNULL(EXPLANATION_ID,0) NOT IN (18,26,28)
aggregate.groupBy: FORMAT(START_DATE, 'yyyy-MM')

aggregate.select: CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, ei.BIRTH_DATE, GETDATE()) >= 59 THEN 'Baby Boomer' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, ei.BIRTH_DATE, GETDATE()) BETWEEN 44 AND 58 THEN 'Gen X' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, ei.BIRTH_DATE, GETDATE()) BETWEEN 28 AND 43 THEN 'Milenyum' ELSE 'Gen Z' END AS label, COUNT(DISTINCT [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].EMPLOYEE_ID) AS value
aggregate.where: [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].FINISH_DATE IS NULL AND [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].START_DATE IS NOT NULL AND ei.BIRTH_DATE IS NOT NULL
aggregate.groupBy: CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, ei.BIRTH_DATE, GETDATE()) >= 59 THEN 'Baby Boomer' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, ei.BIRTH_DATE, GETDATE()) BETWEEN 44 AND 58 THEN 'Gen X' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, ei.BIRTH_DATE, GETDATE()) BETWEEN 28 AND 43 THEN 'Milenyum' ELSE 'Gen Z' END

aggregate.select: ISNULL(sc.CITY_NAME, 'Belirtilmemis') AS label, COUNT(DISTINCT [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].EMPLOYEE_ID) AS value
aggregate.where: [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].FINISH_DATE IS NULL AND [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].START_DATE IS NOT NULL
aggregate.join: LEFT JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_DETAIL] ed ON ed.EMPLOYEE_ID = [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].EMPLOYEE_ID LEFT JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[SETUP_CITY] sc ON sc.CITY_ID = ed.HOMECITY
aggregate.groupBy: ISNULL(sc.CITY_NAME, 'Belirtilmemis')

aggregate.select: CASE WHEN ep.IS_MASTER = 1 THEN 'Yonetici' ELSE 'Calisan' END AS label, COUNT(DISTINCT [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].EMPLOYEE_ID) AS value
aggregate.where: [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].FINISH_DATE IS NULL AND [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].START_DATE IS NOT NULL
aggregate.join: LEFT JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEE_POSITIONS] ep ON ep.EMPLOYEE_ID = [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].EMPLOYEE_ID AND ep.POSITION_STATUS = 1
aggregate.groupBy: CASE WHEN ep.IS_MASTER = 1 THEN 'Yonetici' ELSE 'Calisan' END

aggregate.select: CASE WHEN ep.IS_MASTER = 1 THEN 'Yonetici' ELSE 'Calisan' END AS label, COUNT(DISTINCT [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].EMPLOYEE_ID) AS value
aggregate.where: [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].FINISH_DATE IS NULL AND [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].START_DATE IS NOT NULL AND ed.SEX = 0
aggregate.join: LEFT JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_DETAIL] ed ON ed.EMPLOYEE_ID = [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].EMPLOYEE_ID LEFT JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEE_POSITIONS] ep ON ep.EMPLOYEE_ID = [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].EMPLOYEE_ID AND ep.POSITION_STATUS = 1
aggregate.groupBy: CASE WHEN ep.IS_MASTER = 1 THEN 'Yonetici' ELSE 'Calisan' END

aggregate.select: CASE WHEN ed.DEFECTED = 1 OR io2.DEFECTION_LEVEL > 0 THEN 'Engelli' ELSE 'Engelli Degil' END AS label, COUNT(DISTINCT [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].EMPLOYEE_ID) AS value
aggregate.where: [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].FINISH_DATE IS NULL AND [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].START_DATE IS NOT NULL
aggregate.join: LEFT JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_DETAIL] ed ON ed.EMPLOYEE_ID = [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].EMPLOYEE_ID LEFT JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT] io2 ON io2.EMPLOYEE_ID = [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].EMPLOYEE_ID AND io2.FINISH_DATE IS NULL
aggregate.groupBy: CASE WHEN ed.DEFECTED = 1 OR io2.DEFECTION_LEVEL > 0 THEN 'Engelli' ELSE 'Engelli Degil' END

aggregate.select: ISNULL(os.ORGANIZATION_STEP_NAME, 'Belirtilmemis') AS label, COUNT(DISTINCT [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].EMPLOYEE_ID) AS value
aggregate.where: [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].FINISH_DATE IS NULL AND [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].START_DATE IS NOT NULL
aggregate.join: LEFT JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEE_POSITIONS] ep ON ep.EMPLOYEE_ID = [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].EMPLOYEE_ID AND ep.POSITION_STATUS = 1 LEFT JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[SETUP_ORGANIZATION_STEPS] os ON os.ORGANIZATION_STEP_ID = ep.ORGANIZATION_STEP_ID
aggregate.groupBy: ISNULL(os.ORGANIZATION_STEP_NAME, 'Belirtilmemis')

aggregate.select: CAST(s.PERIOD_YEAR AS VARCHAR) AS label, CAST(AVG(CASE WHEN ed.SEX = 1 THEN TRY_CAST(s.MONEY AS DECIMAL(18,2)) END) AS INT) AS male_avg, CAST(AVG(CASE WHEN ed.SEX = 0 THEN TRY_CAST(s.MONEY AS DECIMAL(18,2)) END) AS INT) AS female_avg, CAST(AVG(TRY_CAST(s.MONEY AS DECIMAL(18,2))) AS INT) AS value
aggregate.where: [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].FINISH_DATE IS NULL AND TRY_CAST(s.MONEY AS DECIMAL(18,2)) > 0 AND s.PERIOD_YEAR >= YEAR(GETDATE()) - 5
aggregate.join: LEFT JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_DETAIL] ed ON ed.EMPLOYEE_ID = [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].EMPLOYEE_ID LEFT JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_SALARY] s ON s.IN_OUT_ID = [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].IN_OUT_ID
aggregate.groupBy: s.PERIOD_YEAR

aggregate.select: 'Yeni Ise Alim' AS label, COUNT(DISTINCT EMPLOYEE_ID) AS value
aggregate.where: FINISH_DATE IS NULL AND START_DATE >= DATEADD(MONTH, -12, GETDATE())

aggregate.select: 'Ic Transfer' AS label, COUNT(DISTINCT EMPLOYEE_ID) AS value
aggregate.where: FINISH_DATE IS NULL AND DUTY_TYPE IN (3, 4) AND START_DATE >= DATEADD(YEAR, -1, GETDATE())

aggregate.select: CASE WHEN EXPLANATION_ID IS NOT NULL THEN ISNULL(r.REASON, 'Diger') ELSE 'Gonullu' END AS label, COUNT(*) AS value
aggregate.where: FINISH_DATE IS NOT NULL AND FINISH_DATE >= DATEADD(YEAR, -1, GETDATE())
aggregate.groupBy: CASE WHEN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].EXPLANATION_ID IS NOT NULL THEN ISNULL(r.REASON, 'Diger') ELSE 'Gonullu' END
